---
title: "Plumage_environment"
author: "Ore, MJ."
date: "2025-03-11"
output: rmarkdown::github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(viridis)
library(mgcv)
library(lmerTest)
library(MuMIn)
library(patchwork)

```

```{r prep data, echo = FALSE}

here::i_am("R_scripts/Color_correlations.Rmd")


avg_img <- read.csv(here("data/BTBW_whole_specimen_Image_Analysis_measurements_allpop_avgimg_wide.csv"))

## select only brightness for ASY males
asy <- avg_img %>% 
  filter(Age == "ASY") 

# combine w environment data  
env <- read.table(here("data/Env_by_individual_specimen_samples.txt"), header = T) %>% 
  dplyr::select(-Year)

lum_env <- merge(asy, env) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(PC1_d))

```

## Does location predict color ? 

```{r spatio-temporal fit, echo = F}

#perform linear regression
z <- lm(PC1_d~lat, data = asy, na.action = na.exclude)
sum_z <- summary(z)

# Extract the r^2 and p-value
r2adj <- sum_z$adj.r.squared
p_value <- sum_z$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

# Format the text to include rho and p-value, ready to be used in annotations
text_annotation <- paste0("Adjusted R² = ", sprintf("%.2f", r2adj), 
                          ", p = ", sprintf("%.3f", p_value))


ggplot(data = asy, aes(x = lat, y = PC1_d)) + 
  geom_point(width = 0.6, position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
  labs(x = "Latitude", y = "PC1 mantle") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = lat, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  theme_classic() +
  annotate("text", x = Inf, y = Inf, label = text_annotation, 
           hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.1, size = 5, color = "blue")+
  theme(
    aspect.ratio = 0.75,
    text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )


## spatio-temporal fit
mod2d <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat), 
                data = lum_env)
mod2dbyY <- gam( PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat, by = Year), 
                data = lum_env)
mod2dYY <- gam( PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat, by = Year) + Year,
               data = lum_env)
mod2dY <- gam( PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + Year, method = "REML",
                   data = lum_env) 
modnull <- lm(PC1_d ~ 1, data = lum_env) 
modlmlat_randY <- lmerTest::lmer(PC1_d ~ lat + (1|Year),
                    data = lum_env, REML = T) 
modlmY <- lm(PC1_d ~ Year, data = lum_env, REML = T) 


aicsc <- AICc(mod2d ,mod2dbyY, mod2dYY, mod2dY,
              modnull, modlmlat_randY, modlmY)
aicsc$deltaic <- aicsc$AIC - min(aicsc$AIC)
aicsc$weights <- Weights(AICc(mod2d ,mod2dbyY, mod2dYY, mod2dY, 
              modnull, modlmlat_randY,modlmY))

mod_names <- c("mod2d" ,"mod2dbyY", "mod2dYY", "mod2dY", 
              "modnull", "modlmlat_randY", "modlmY")
# Extract formulas as a character vector
aicsc$formulas <- lapply(mod_names, function(model_name) {
  model <- get(model_name)  # Retrieve the model object by name
  paste(deparse(formula(model)), collapse = " ")  # Convert the formula to a single string
}) 

aicsc_r <- aicsc %>%
  mutate(
    MarginalR2 = sapply(mod_names, function(model_name) {
      model <- get(model_name)  # Retrieve the model object by name
      if (inherits(model, "lmerMod")) {
        r.squaredGLMM(model)[1]  # Extract marginal R²
      } else {
        NA  # Return NA for non-lmer models
      }
    }),
    ConditionalR2 = sapply(mod_names, function(model_name) {
       model <- get(model_name)  # Retrieve the model object by name
      if (inherits(model, "lmerMod")) {
        r.squaredGLMM(model)[2]  # Extract conditional R²
      } else {
        NA  # Return NA for non-lmer models
      }
    })
  )

aicsc_r$formulas <- as.character(aicsc_r$formulas)
aicsc_r$df <- round(aicsc_r$df, digits = 2)
aicsc_r$AICc <- round(aicsc_r$AICc, digits = 2)
aicsc_r$deltaic <- round(aicsc_r$deltaic, digits = 2)
aicsc_r$weights <- signif(aicsc_r$weights, digits = 2)
aicsc_r$MarginalR2 <- signif(aicsc_r$MarginalR2, digits = 2)
aicsc_r$ConditionalR2 <- signif(aicsc_r$ConditionalR2, digits = 2)


model_results <- aicsc_r %>% 
  arrange(deltaic) %>% 
  dplyr::select(formulas, everything()) 

model_results

write.csv(model_results, here("results/spatiotemp_model_selection_table.csv"), row.names = F)

```

## GAMs

```{r env GAM}

mantle <- gam(PC1_d ~ s(lon, lat) + s(RH_br) + s(Tave_br) +
                + s(PPT_br) + s(srtm) + s(ndvi_M), select = T, 
            data = lum_env, method = "REML") 


crown <- gam(PC1_c ~ s(lon, lat) + s(RH_br) + s(Tave_br) +
                + s(PPT_br) + s(srtm) + s(ndvi_M), select = T, 
            data = lum_env, method = "REML", na.action = "na.omit") 
summary(crown)

covert <- gam(PC1_o ~ s(lon, lat) + s(RH_br) + s(Tave_br) +
                + s(PPT_br) + s(srtm) + s(ndvi_M), select = T, 
            data = lum_env, method = "REML", na.action = "na.omit") 
summary(covert)

throat <- gam(PC1_t ~ s(lon, lat) + s(RH_br) + s(Tave_br) +
                + s(PPT_br) + s(srtm) + s(ndvi_M), select = T, 
            data = lum_env, method = "REML", na.action = "na.omit") 
summary(throat)

wspot <- gam(PC1_w ~ s(lon, lat) + s(RH_br) + s(Tave_br) +
                + s(PPT_br) + s(srtm) + s(ndvi_M), select = T, 
            data = lum_env, method = "REML", na.action = "na.omit") 
summary(wspot)




```

```{r table env vs plumage}
library(dplyr)

pl_gams <- list(mantle = mantle, belly = belly, covert = covert, crown = crown, throat =  throat, wspot = wspot)

# Extract smooth and parametric terms for each GAM
gam_tables <- lapply(pl_gams, function(model) {
  # Get the summary of the model
  model_summary <- summary(model)
  
  # Extract smooth terms
  smooth_terms <- as.data.frame(model_summary$s.table)
  smooth_terms <- cbind(Term = rownames(smooth_terms), smooth_terms)
  rownames(smooth_terms) <- NULL

  return(smooth_terms)
})


combined_gam <- bind_rows(gam_tables, .id = "Model")%>% 
 mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ ifelse(. < 0.001, format(., scientific = TRUE, digits = 3),
                                           round(., 2))))

write.csv(combined_gam, here("results/Env_GAM_pl_patches.csv"), row.names = F)

```

```{r plot}

srtm_fit <- data.frame(
  srtm = seq(min(lum_env$srtm), max(lum_env$srtm), length.out = 100),
  lat = mean(lum_env$lat),
  lon = mean(lum_env$lon),
  RH_br = mean(lum_env$RH_br),
  Tave_br = mean(lum_env$Tave_br),
  PPT_br = mean(lum_env$PPT_br),
  ndvi_M = mean(lum_env$ndvi_M)
)

predictions <- predict(mantle, newdata = srtm_fit, se.fit = TRUE)

# Add predictions and confidence intervals to the new data frame
srtm_fit$PC1_d_pred <- predictions$fit
srtm_fit$lower_CI <- predictions$fit - 1.96 * predictions$se.fit  # 95% lower bound
srtm_fit$upper_CI <- predictions$fit + 1.96 * predictions$se.fit  # 95% upper bound

elev <- ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = srtm, y = PC1_d, color = lat)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +  # Observed data
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  geom_line(data = srtm_fit, aes(x = srtm, y = PC1_d_pred), size = 1, color = "black") +  
  geom_ribbon(data = srtm_fit, aes(x = srtm, ymin = lower_CI, ymax = upper_CI),
              alpha = 0.2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +  # Confidence intervals
  labs(x = "Elevation", y = "PC1 Mantle") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(text=element_text(size=24))  


tave_fit <- data.frame(
  srtm = mean(lum_env$srtm),
  lat = mean(lum_env$lat),
  lon = mean(lum_env$lon),
  RH_br = mean(lum_env$RH_br),
  Tave_br = seq(min(lum_env$Tave_br), max(lum_env$Tave_br), length.out = 100),
  PPT_br = mean(lum_env$PPT_br),
  ndvi_M = mean(lum_env$ndvi_M)
)

predictions <- predict(mantle, newdata = tave_fit, se.fit = TRUE)

# Add predictions and confidence intervals to the new data frame
tave_fit$PC1_d_pred <- predictions$fit
tave_fit$lower_CI <- predictions$fit - 1.96 * predictions$se.fit  # 95% lower bound
tave_fit$upper_CI <- predictions$fit + 1.96 * predictions$se.fit  # 95% upper bound

temp <- ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = Tave08_molt, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size = 4)+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  labs(x = "Mean Temperature", y = "PC1 Mantle")+
  geom_line(data = tave_fit, aes(x = Tave_br, y = PC1_d_pred, color = lat), size = 1) +  
  geom_ribbon(data = tave_fit, aes(x = Tave_br, ymin = lower_CI, ymax = upper_CI),
              alpha = 0.2, inherit.aes = FALSE) +  # Confidence intervals
  guides(color = "none") +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(text=element_text(size=24))  




latplot <- ggplot(data = lum_env, aes(x = lat, y = PC1_d, color = lat))+
  geom_point(size = 4)+
  scale_x_reverse()+
  scale_color_viridis_c(direction = -1)+
  labs(x = "Latitude", y = "PC1 Mantle")+
  guides(color = "none") +
  geom_smooth(aes(x = lat, y = PC1_d), method = "lm", col = "black")+
  theme_classic()+
  theme(text=element_text(size=24))  

# Combine plots into 1 row and 3 columns with labels
env_plots <- (latplot + temp + elev) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")+  # Adds labels A, B, C
  plot_layout(axis_titles = "collect")

env_plots

ggsave(here("results/top_env_plots.png"), plot = env_plots, width = 24, height = 8, dpi = 600)

```
